title: How to get a police certificate - Bahamas - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate - Bahamas
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
Police Character Certificate

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.

### If you live in the Bahamas

#### If you live in Nassau
Apply online on the Royal Bahamas Police Force website (check Special considerations for a complete list of stations that accept applications).

### If you don’t live in Nassau
You may appoint a representative to apply on your behalf to the Superintendent, CID, Criminal Records Office (check Contact information for the complete address).
If someone is collecting your character certificates for you, they must have
- one of the following documents: passport driver’s license voter’s card
You can then pick up your completed certificate at the station where you applied unless a fingerprint check is required. In those cases, the certificate will be available at the Criminal Records Office on Thompson Boulevard.

### If you live outside of the Bahamas
Apply online or on paper (check Contact information for email contact, for the form and procedure).
Former residents of the Bahamas may appoint a representative to apply on their behalf to the Superintendent, CID, Criminal Records Office (check Contact information for the complete address).
If someone is collecting your character certificates for you, they must have
- one of the following documents: passport driver’s licence voter’s card

## Special considerations
You can apply for a police certificate at the following Royal Bahamas Police Force stations:
- Grand Bahama Islands
Visit the Royal Bahamas Police Force website for more information. If you cannot reach the website, please contact the Royal Bahamas Police by phone or email.

### Criminal Records Office of the Royal Bahamas Police Force
East Hill Street P. O. Box N 458 and N 3020 Nassau, N.P. The Bahamas Phone: 242-322-4444 Fax: 242-328-2688 Email: info@rbpf.org
